ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rich_text_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "fact_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fact or entity associated with the content */,
  "field_model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the field model or template used to create the content */,
  "ordinal" INTEGER /* Ordinal position of the content within a larger document or table */,
  "content" TEXT /* Rich text content with formatting options */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the content was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the content */,
  "creator_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the content */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the content is deleted */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional metadata about the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rich_text_content_field_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_model_id") REFERENCES field_models ("field_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rich_text_content_fact_id FOREIGN KEY ("fact_id") REFERENCES facts ("fact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_models" (
  "field_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field model */,
  "field_model_name" TEXT /* Name of the field model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the field model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the field model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the field model */,
  "creator_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the field model */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the field model is a default model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facts" (
  "fact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fact */,
  "fact_name" TEXT /* Name of the fact */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the fact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the fact */,
  "creator_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the fact */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the fact is deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, editor, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the collaboration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the collaboration is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES rich_text_content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being revised */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the revision */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "revision_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the revision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the revision was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the revision */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the revision is deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES rich_text_content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the content */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the content was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the analytics record */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES rich_text_content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "template_content" TEXT /* Content of the template */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the template was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the template */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the template is shared */,
  "share_url" TEXT /* URL to share the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_templates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service being integrated */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the integration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the integration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the integration is active */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last synchronization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)
